# FitnessFácil.es — LLMs.txt

## Site Description

FitnessFácil.es is a Spanish affiliate blog and fitness equipment review site targeting Spanish adults who want to exercise at home without going to a gym. Published by Mkt Web 360 SLU (CIF B87679304).

## Main Topics

- Home fitness equipment: treadmills, stationary bikes, dumbbells/weights, yoga mats
- Fitness training guides and workout plans in Spanish
- Sports supplements (whey protein, creatine) with health disclaimers
- Weight loss and fat burning programs for home exercise

## Health Disclaimer

All content on FitnessFácil.es is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Users should consult a doctor before starting any exercise program or taking supplements.

## Content Index

### Store Pages
- /tienda — Main store with all categories
- /tienda/cintas-correr — Treadmills for home use
- /tienda/bicicletas-estaticas — Stationary bikes and ellipticals
- /tienda/pesas-mancuernas — Dumbbells, weights, kettlebells
- /tienda/esterillas-yoga — Yoga and exercise mats
- /tienda/suplementos-proteinas — Whey protein and creatine supplements

### Featured Products
- /tienda/cintas-correr/toorx-trx-50s — Toorx TRX-50S (best value treadmill)
- /tienda/cintas-correr/reebok-one-gt40s — Reebok GT40S (premium treadmill)
- /tienda/bicicletas-estaticas/bh-fitness-sb2-6 — BH Fitness SB2.6 spinning bike
- /tienda/pesas-mancuernas/bowflex-selecttech-552 — Bowflex SelectTech 552 adjustable dumbbells
- /tienda/esterillas-yoga/manduka-pro-yoga-mat — Manduka PRO lifetime warranty mat
- /tienda/suplementos-proteinas/optimum-nutrition-gold-standard-whey — ON Gold Standard Whey

### Blog Posts
- /blog/mejor-cinta-correr-casa-2025 — Best treadmill for home 2025
- /blog/bicicleta-estatica-o-eliptica — Stationary bike vs elliptical for weight loss
- /blog/rutina-entrenamiento-casa-sin-equipamiento — 4-week home workout plan (no equipment)
- /blog/mancuernas-ajustables-merece-pena — Are adjustable dumbbells worth it?
- /blog/proteina-whey-guia-completa — Complete whey protein guide for beginners
- /blog/yoga-en-casa-principiantes — Beginner yoga at home guide
- /blog/perder-peso-ejercicio-casa — 8-week weight loss plan at home
- /blog/creatina-para-que-sirve — Creatine guide: benefits, dosage and safety

## Affiliate Disclosure

Participates in Amazon Associates (ID: cclaserdepi01-21). Commissions earned on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to users.

## Language

All content in Spanish (es-ES).
